data.body: EPIC DELIVERED: Gerrit stack 287-290 all MERGED; origin/main advanced to 1b77c6dad (merge of the 4 changes). Commits on main: a06d00a95 (C1 524d), cd5f9db06 (C2 7522), be8f12982 (C3 2711), bbfa1c1d9 (C4 9ed2). Epic 6c9c + all 4 children closed. Reconciler pass-lock/phase-gate now on refs/reconciler/* (self-healing lease+heartbeat), file backend + b859 loop + merge=ours carve-out retired with migrations. Done.
